testsuite.name: io.github.eucsoh.integration.RealLogsIntegrationTest

testcase.name: real logs analysis pipeline runs end-to-end()
real logs folder structure is correct if it exists()

testsuite.system-out:
✓ Found 8 real log files in src/test/resources/real_logs Running full analysis pipeline... [calibrateEa] Calibrated Ea=20.0kJ/mol (T range: 16.0–35.0°C, n=8) ✓ Analyzed 8 logs ✓ Inferred pack: 32S, 118.4V nominal ✓ Req_median threshold: μ=0,0241Ω, σ=0,0254Ω ✓ All critical metrics present ✓ Km range: 419 - 7929 km (Δ=7510 km) ✓ Detected 5 alarms - Gaussian: 5 alarms ✓ Summary built successfully Req band: 0,0055 - 0,0422 Ω Pack: 32S, R_pack=0,448Ω
✓ Real logs integration test PASSED ✓ Found 8 valid CSV files in real_logs folder
